bg.$description: App page background — cream paper, deepened. Showcase --bg.

inset.$description: Depressed surface (inputs, search wells, chips). Showcase --inset.

ink.$description: Primary text + primary CTA fill. Showcase --ink.

text-3.$description: Tertiary text — metadata, mono labels. Showcase --text-3 (lifted for AA body 4.84:1).

accent.$description: v2 — Signal-orange accent. Re-pointed from forest-jade in DS v2 Phase 3b. Drives CTAs, focus glow, citation, verified accent. Showcase --accent.

accent-shadow.$description: v2 — Drop-shadow tint for filled-accent surfaces (signal-orange @ 32%). Showcase --accent-shadow.

accent-glow.$description: v2 — Pulse halo + focus glow on inputs (signal-orange @ 22%). Showcase --accent-glow.

terra.$description: v2 — Signal-orange-deep. Re-pointed from terra-bronze in DS v2 Phase 3b. Drift / negative delta / danger / warning. Showcase --terra.

terra-shadow.$description: v2 — Drop-shadow tint for filled-terra/danger surfaces (signal-orange-deep @ 30%).

primary.$description: Legacy alias for app background → showcase --bg.

secondary.$description: Legacy alias — striped rows / subtle sections.

elevated.$description: Legacy alias — cards / popovers (pair with shadow).

muted.$description: Muted UI text. AA-compliant (4.84:1 on bg).

brand.$description: Brand-text now equals ink — primary signal in v1.1 is ink-CTA, not jade.

inverse.$description: Text on inverse surfaces (toast, on-ink CTA).

onAccent.$description: Text on filled jade/forest-accent surfaces — 7.50:1 AAA.

subtle.$description: Card edges, input borders, toggle borders. Showcase --border.

divider.$description: v1.1 dedicated divider token — column separators.

default.$description: v2 — re-pointed from jade in DS v2 Phase 3b. Per spec §11.1.
v2 — re-pointed from terra in DS v2 Phase 3b. Per spec §11.1.
v2 — warning collapsed to signal-orange-deep (was terra).
v2 — re-pointed from jade in DS v2 Phase 3b. Gain — always paired with leading + and iconography (icon carries the polarity, color is brand-accent only).
v2 — re-pointed from terra in DS v2 Phase 3b. Loss — always paired with leading − (U+2212) and iconography.

primaryHover.$description: Hover handled via translateY + shadow lift, not color shift.

soft.$description: Soft lift — swatches, type-rows, dropdown trigger states.

card.$description: Card lift — multi-axis cream-tinted. Default card surface.

lift.$description: Stronger card lift — signature card / topbar / hero ledger.

toast.$description: Toast / floating surfaces sitting on bg (no card scaffold). Round-7 audit 2026-04-29 — removed -3px -3px cream highlight that read as upper-left «glow». Now pure top-down drop with subtle top-edge inset rim.

modal.$description: Modal panel above backdrop. Round-7 audit 2026-04-29 — removed -2px -2px cream highlight that read as upper-left «glow». Now top-down drop sits on paper instead of floating with side-lit halo.

input-inset.$description: Input depressed slot — text inputs / search ONLY. v1.1 toggles do NOT use this.

inset-light.$description: Light inset — chips, citations, tabs-track, btn-icon, info-toast, empty-icon.

primary-extrude.$description: Primary CTA — ink button extruded. v1.1 ink-CTA depth.

chart-card.$description: ChartCard — paper-pressed neumorphism. Outer warm cream-shadow + cream rim highlight + subtle bottom inset so the card reads as «paper sitting on the table», not floating.

chart-bar-emboss.$description: SVG drop-shadow filter for chart bars — single-axis emboss + cream-edge highlight, applied as `filter` on the Recharts <Bar> wrapper.

chart-line-emboss.$description: SVG drop-shadow filter for chart line strokes — subtle ink-on-paper feel.

chart-slice-hover.$description: DonutChart V2 hover slice shadow — paper-press neumorphism (layer 1) + accent glow (layer 2 = --accent-glow). Source: DECISIONS.md «DonutChart anatomy + interaction» call 4. Reused across BarChart hover, treemap tile hover, scatter point hover.

1.$description: Chart series 1 — museum-slate. Re-pointed 2026-04-29 from forest-jade to museum-categorical for V1 palette swap. Source: DECISIONS.md «Charts palette: museum-vitrine extension».

2.$description: Chart series 2 — museum-ochre. Re-pointed 2026-04-29 (was bronze). Maximum hue separation from slate (Δ=185°).

3.$description: Chart series 3 — museum-fog-blue. Re-pointed 2026-04-29 (was ink). Sole blue-direction; honours no-blue rule via 0.04 chroma cap.

4.$description: Chart series 4 — museum-plum. Re-pointed 2026-04-29 (was jade-lifted). Magenta quadrant filler.

5.$description: Chart series 5 — museum-stone. Re-pointed 2026-04-29 (was graphite). Neutral fallback; lowest chroma in family.

8.$description: Chart series 8 — ochre. CHART-ONLY editorial extension.

9.$description: Chart series 9 — aubergine. CHART-ONLY editorial extension.

10.$description: Chart series 10 — cobalt-ink. CHART-ONLY editorial extension.

11.$description: Chart series 11 — dusty mauve. CHART-ONLY editorial extension.

12.$description: Chart series 12 — clay tan. CHART-ONLY editorial extension.

base.$description: Categorical series 1 — roasted-cocoa base. WCAG 5.8:1 vs cream. Inlined from former editorial-mh3 primitive (deleted in DS v2 Phase 3b).

top.$description: Categorical series 1 — roasted-cocoa top stop for H3 linear-gradient (ΔL +0.10 vs base).

bottom.$description: Categorical series 1 — roasted-cocoa bottom stop for H3 linear-gradient (ΔL −0.10 vs base).

base.$description: Categorical series 2 — burnished-gold base. WCAG 3.6:1 vs cream.
Categorical series 3 — aubergine base. WCAG 5.4:1 vs cream.
Categorical series 4 — wine base. WCAG 5.7:1 vs cream.
Categorical series 5 — slate-blue base. WCAG 4.9:1 vs cream.

7.$description: Sequential ramp 7/7 — bottom magnitude (light); near visibility floor — pair with hairline outline.

chart-grid-strong.$description: Chart strong gridline (reference lines, axis emphasis) — light theme.

chart-axis-label.$description: Chart axis label fill — equals text-3.

chart-cursor.$description: Chart cursor / hover crosshair — light theme.
